title: Apple Wallet loyalty (storeCard) — verified facts index
purpose: Machine-readable index of adversarially-verified facts for AI retrieval. Each fact has confidence + source. See sibling markdown files for full detail.

currency.note: Year-based versioning since WWDC 2025 (18 -> 26). .pkpass/storeCard format stable across iOS 18-26; storeCard not deprecated.

confidence_levels.VERIFIED: Apple primary doc or 3-0 adversarial verification
confidence_levels.VERIFIED_SECONDARY: Confirmed via maintained library / JSON schema / community (Apple modern docs JS-gated)
confidence_levels.CORRECTED: First draft was wrong; value here is the corrected one

facts.fact: .pkpass is a ZIP of pass.json + images + manifest.json (SHA-1 hashes) + 'signature' (PKCS#7 detached sig of manifest.json)
MIME type is application/vnd.apple.pkpass (dot-separated). Bundle of many = application/vnd.apple.pkpasses
facts.trap: application/vnd-apple.pkpass (hyphen) is wrong and breaks iOS

facts.fact: storeCard is the correct pass style for loyalty/points/discount/gift cards; one of 5 styles (boardingPass, coupon, eventTicket, generic, storeCard); not deprecated
Required top-level keys: formatVersion(=1), passTypeIdentifier, serialNumber, teamIdentifier, organizationName, description, + one style dict
passTypeIdentifier + serialNumber uniquely identify a pass; teamIdentifier is the 10-char Team ID; both ids must match the signing certificate
Only 3 color keys: backgroundColor, foregroundColor, labelColor — all rgb(r,g,b) strings (0-255). Hex is silently ignored
stripColor is NOT a confirmed Apple key — absent from Apple primary docs and JSON schema; 3rd-party only with conflicting definitions. Do not rely on it
webServiceURL (HTTPS, should end with '/') + authenticationToken (>=16 chars) enable updates; include both or neither; authenticationToken must NOT change on update
barcodes (array, iOS9+) supersedes barcode (singular, deprecated). Keys: format, message, messageEncoding (iso-8859-1), altText
Exactly 4 formats: PKBarcodeFormatQR, PKBarcodeFormatPDF417, PKBarcodeFormatAztec, PKBarcodeFormatCode128. NO 1D retail (EAN/UPC/Code39), Data Matrix, MaxiCode. Code128 unsupported on watchOS
locations (max 10; lat/long req, altitude/relevantText opt), maxDistance (m), beacons (max 10; proximityUUID req, major/minor/relevantText/name opt), relevantDate (ISO8601+offset)
facts.note: beacon 'name' key was an easy omission

facts.fact: expirationDate (ISO8601), voided (bool), associatedStoreIdentifiers (App Store numeric ids), appLaunchURL, userInfo (dict, never displayed)
sharingProhibited, groupingIdentifier, suppressStripShine, semantics, nfc (storeCard-only, needs NFC approval)
storeCard dict has headerFields(<=3), primaryFields(1), secondaryFields(<=4), auxiliaryFields(<=4), backFields(unlimited)
With a square barcode (QR/Aztec), secondaryFields + auxiliaryFields COMBINED must not exceed 4
Field dict requires key + value; label optional. value = String|Number|ISO8601-date
changeMessage must contain %@ (placeholder for new value); produces a lock-screen notification on push update
textAlignment: PKTextAlignmentLeft|Center|Right|Natural (no Justified). Header fields default Right
currencyCode (ISO4217) or numberStyle (PKNumberStyleDecimal|Percent|Scientific|SpellOut); mutually exclusive
dateStyle/timeStyle share PKDateStyleNone|Short|Medium|Long|Full enum; ignoresTimeZone, isRelative booleans
dataDetectorTypes (back fields only): PKDataDetectorTypePhoneNumber|Link|Address|CalendarEvent; omit=all, []=none. attributedValue supports <a>,<b>,<i>,<u>,<s>
storeCard supports only 3 images: icon, logo, strip (no thumbnail/background)
icon.png 29x29pt / 58x58 @2x / 87x87 @3x. Effectively required (signing fails without it); appears on lock screen + Mail, not pass front
logo.png 160x50pt(max) / 320x100 @2x / 480x150 @3x; top-left next to logoText
storeCard strip.png = 375x144pt / 750x288 @2x / 1125x432 @3x (gift-card/coupon bucket). NOT 375x98 (that is event tickets). Alt documented size 375x123
thumbnail 90x90pt, background 180x220pt, footer 286x15pt — none used by storeCard
PNG, sRGB, alpha for icon/logo; provide @1x/@2x/@3x
facts.source: walletwallet.alen.ro (sRGB not verbatim in Apple guide)

facts.fact: <lang>.lproj/ dirs with pass.strings ('key' = 'value'; ; non-ASCII saved UTF-16). Localized images go inside .lproj (and removed from root). Lang codes ISO 639-1
Account Holder/Admin: register Pass Type ID, then create its certificate from a CSR (Keychain Certificate Assistant or openssl), download .cer
Signature must include the Apple WWDR intermediate, generation G4 (certs after 2022-01-27). G2/G3/G5/G6 fail; G1 expired 2023-02-07

5 build steps: source files; pass type id; signing cert; digital signature; signed bundle. Sign = SHA-1 manifest -> PKCS#7 detached sign manifest.json (incl WWDR) -> file 'signature' -> zip CONTENTS -> rename .pkpass
openssl smime -binary -sign -certfile wwdr.pem -signer signerCert.pem -inkey signerKey.pem -in manifest.json -out signature -outform DER
3 methods: in-app (PKAddPassButton + PKAddPassesViewController.canAddPasses then present), web download (Add to Apple Wallet badge), email attachment. Must use Apple's badge artwork
Update = serve new version with same passTypeIdentifier+serialNumber; any field changes except serialNumber and authenticationToken
All endpoints under {webServiceURL}v1/. Auth header: 'Authorization: ApplePass {authenticationToken}'. Path param is deviceLibraryIdentifier (not deviceID)
facts.trap: deviceID is wrong; it is deviceLibraryIdentifier

facts.fact: POST /v1/devices/{deviceLibraryIdentifier}/registrations/{passTypeId}/{serial} body {pushToken} -> 201 new / 200 already / 401. Auth required
GET /v1/devices/{deviceLibraryIdentifier}/registrations/{passTypeId}?passesUpdatedSince={tag} -> 200 {serialNumbers,lastUpdated} / 204 none. No auth per spec
GET /v1/passes/{passTypeId}/{serial}, If-Modified-Since -> 200 .pkpass (Content-Type application/vnd.apple.pkpass, Last-Modified) / 304 / 401. Auth required
DELETE /v1/devices/{deviceLibraryIdentifier}/registrations/{passTypeId}/{serial} -> 200 / 401. Auth required
POST /v1/log body {logs:[...]} -> 200. No auth
lastUpdated/passesUpdatedSince is an opaque, monotonically-increasing tag (e.g. Unix epoch string '1351981923'); maps to passes.updated_at
Pass push = empty JSON payload {}; topic = passTypeIdentifier; signals 'something for this pass type changed -> poll'. Pushes coalesce; best-effort delivery
HTTP/2 to api.push.apple.com (prod) / api.sandbox.push.apple.com (sandbox; archived docs say api.development.push.apple.com), path /3/device/{token}, ports 443/2197. Legacy binary retired 2021-03-31
apns-push-type: background + apns-priority: 5 (10 rejected for background type) + apns-expiration: 0. push-type header postdates PassKit spec (community practice)

Cert-based: TLS client cert = Pass Type ID cert (same as signing). Token-based: .p8 JWT ES256 {alg,kid}/{iss,iat}, 'authorization: bearer <jwt>', 1h expiry. Signing always needs the .p12 (no .p8 equivalent)
No published numeric rate limit; behavioral guidance: push only on real change, only to registered devices; remove devices on invalid-token feedback

passkit-generator (alexandercerutti) v3.5.7 (2025-12-25) is the Node standard. PKPass.from(model, certificates, props); certificates {wwdr,signerCert,signerKey,signerKeyPassphrase}; getAsBuffer/getAsStream/getAsRaw; PKPass.pack; .mimeType=application/vnd.apple.pkpass
Alternatives: .NET dotnet-passbook v4.0.1 (2025-06-05, netstandard2.0); Go alvinbaena/passkit; Java jpasskit. node-passbook deprecated/abandoned

Bounded contexts: Loyalty/Membership (Member, points, tier), Pass Issuance (PassTemplate, Pass), Device Registration & Updates (Device, Registration); + Certificate/Key Mgmt. Integrate via events, not shared domain objects

Aggregate roots: Member(MemberId), PassTemplate(PassTypeId), Pass(SerialNumber; holds authenticationToken immutable, lastUpdated), Device(DeviceLibraryIdentifier; Registration links by ID). Reference other aggregates by ID only

Postgres tables: pass_types, passes(serial_number unique, authentication_token, field_values jsonb, updated_at), devices(device_library_identifier unique, push_token), registrations(device_id, pass_id unique). Index passes(pass_type_id, updated_at)
Serve signed buffer with Content-Type application/vnd.apple.pkpass + Last-Modified; pre-generate+cache by serial+version, invalidate on update
NFC tap-to-use = Apple Pay Value Added Services (VAS). Needs a special NFC Pass Type ID certificate + Apple approval + VAS-certified terminals + POS changes. Barcode/QR loyalty needs NONE of this

nfc dict (storeCard only): message (<=64 bytes), encryptionPublicKey (Base64 X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo, ECDH P-256), requiresAuthentication (bool). VAS uses ECDH P-256 (Apple); AES-GCM cipher per community research only
facts.source: passmeister; kormax/apple-vas; passkit-generator #231; Apple Security Guide (P-256 only)

facts.fact: Current iOS 26, next 27 (year-based since WWDC2025). iOS18: poster event tickets (need NFC). iOS26: Add to Wallet API (loyalty cards) + order tracking. iOS27: Poster Generic template for loyalty/rewards/membership/gift + Featured Actions + Pass Designer (macOS27) + Pass Builder (Swift-on-Server)
Sign server-side only; never commit .p12/PEM/passphrase; store in secrets manager/KMS/HSM. Cert dual-role (sign + cert-based APNs). Expiry ~1yr, cannot renew only replace; rotate ahead
authenticationToken: per-pass bearer secret, >=16 chars (use >=32 random), unique per pass, never changes on update, never logged
